subcodes.first_line: A praise transcending the comprehension of all the peoples of the world befitteth the Lord of contingent being Who, through His all-encompassing Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک عالمیان مقصود امکان را لایق و سزاست که باراده محیطه اش
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @transcendence; unknowability of God
